title: MNQ strategy tester
author: Massive-Tangelo2487
selftext:
Hi guys

I have been using AI so far to refined indicators and learning but recently i started working on a fully automated system where i can paste any strategy here and it runs all the possibilities parameters in the strategy and selects the best combination over 5 year mnq data

Also it compares the result with prop firm challenge so it shows how long it will take to pass the prop firm if i automated this 

But i am still not there facing some issues which i am trying to fix

If anyone want to

Collaborate to make it better let me know 

The idea is to give it one simple strategy and it can run all the possibilities to find the best combination to pass the prp firm in 10 days 

Happy to discuss

comments.author: lptg13
comments.body: hey where is that data coming from? is it tick?

replies.author: Massive-Tangelo2487
replies.body: 5 year data downloaded from live data provider. Its uploaded on a cloud vps server where all the parameters and combinations are tested

replies.author: lptg13
replies.body:
try range bars on a 20-2 bollinger band   
40-52 range  
have it read a larger time frame trend, and only buy the pullbacks in trend alignment

replies.author: Massive-Tangelo2487
replies.body: Do you know any indicator that works on this theory its better if there is a existing one i can test and improve it rather than building from scratch
